untranslatable_reason: TRIX indicator is not available in the allowed indicators list. TRIX requires triple exponential moving average calculation (EMA of EMA of EMA with percentage change), which cannot be constructed from the available indicators. The closest proxy would be MACD (which uses EMA crossovers), but TRIX has a distinct formula with triple smoothing that is not equivalent.
translation_notes: Signal requires TRIX (Triple Exponential Moving Average) with signal line crossover logic. While MACD provides similar crossover functionality, it does not implement the triple exponential smoothing core to TRIX. The parameters specify smoothing constant period < 20 days and the triple EMA formula, which cannot be replicated with available indicators. A proper implementation would require adding TRIX and TRIX_signal as native indicators.
